name: bamboohr-mcp
description: Connects Claude to BambooHR — employees, time off, ATS, benefits, training, goals, and more via 74 tools.

BAMBOOHR_API_KEY.title: BambooHR API Key
BAMBOOHR_API_KEY.description: Your BambooHR API key (from Profile icon > API Keys > Add New Key)

READONLY_MODE.title: Read-Only Mode
READONLY_MODE.description: Set to 'true' to disable all write/destructive tools (default: false)

USE_EMPLOYEES.title: Enable Employees module
USE_EMPLOYEES.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Employees module (default: true)

USE_TIME_OFF.title: Enable Time Off module
USE_TIME_OFF.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Time Off module (default: true)

USE_TIME_TRACKING.title: Enable Time Tracking module
USE_TIME_TRACKING.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Time Tracking module (default: true)

USE_ATS.title: Enable ATS module
USE_ATS.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Applicant Tracking module (default: true)

USE_BENEFITS.title: Enable Benefits module
USE_BENEFITS.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Benefits module (default: true)

USE_REPORTS.title: Enable Reports module
USE_REPORTS.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Reports module (default: true)

USE_TRAINING.title: Enable Training module
USE_TRAINING.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Training module (default: true)

USE_GOALS.title: Enable Goals module
USE_GOALS.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Goals module (default: true)

USE_WEBHOOKS.title: Enable Webhooks module
USE_WEBHOOKS.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Webhooks module (default: true)

USE_FILES.title: Enable Files module
USE_FILES.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Files module (default: true)

USE_ACCOUNT.title: Enable Account module
USE_ACCOUNT.description: Set to 'false' to disable the Account & Metadata module (default: true)
